task: #71 Quantify safe launch knobs after verifier trunk fix

commands.probe: HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 TheRock ROCm 7.13 python probe: LLM.prepare(max_sequence_length=<ctx>), one-token raw warmup, prepare_request_scratch(max_prompt_tokens=ctx-1, max_new_tokens=0, max_batch_size=1, kv_storage=int8_per_token_head, release_after_probe=True)

recommendation.short_chat_and_4k_prompts: Use model/default context (262144) with int8_per_token_head KV when full-context availability is desired; startup and max-prompt scratch probe pass on GPU1. For extra headroom on 24GB cards, cap --max-context-tokens to 131072 or 163840.
recommendation.safe_full_context: 262144 passes but is tight: min_free_gib=0.664 at full_prefill_scratch_live with 256-token low-memory chunks and the 0.5 GiB BF16 INT8 prefill oracle.
recommendation.balanced_24gb_context: 163840 keeps ~1.93 GiB live-probe free and retains faster 1024/4096 chunks.
recommendation.conservative_24gb_context: 131072 keeps ~2.59 GiB live-probe free and retains faster 1024/4096 chunks.
recommendation.next_memory_target: Streaming/row-batched INT8 prefill attention to remove the temporary BF16 INT8 prefill oracle; persistent prefill metadata compaction remains useful too.
